source_shape: Bridge observation rows store tenant, template hash, prompt, response, model, latency, cost, and created_at.
kolm_target_fields: Map to source.system=kolm, source.source_row_id, tenant, input.prompt, output.raw/text, metrics, timestamps.
loss_if_missing: External importers will not have a local baseline for compile candidates.
recommended_action: Use local observation rows as the minimum fixture contract.

source_shape: Capture rows store prompt, response, provider, model, latency_us, status, and corpus_namespace.
kolm_target_fields: Map provider/model/status/latency to metrics and map corpus_namespace to tenant.namespace.
loss_if_missing: Current capture rows will split from imported rows and namespace filters will stay inconsistent.
recommended_action: Normalize capture namespace fields before importer work.

source_shape: `/v1/labels/synthesize-corpus` exports input, output, model, provider, latency_us, and created_at.
kolm_target_fields: Map exported pairs to a lossy compatibility view over `kolm-trace-1`.
loss_if_missing: The current export loses trace hierarchy, scores, tokens, consent, and row checksums.
recommended_action: Keep labels export, but do not use it as the full importer schema.

source_shape: `rs-1-evals` stores cases with id, input, expected, optional params, and coverage.
kolm_target_fields: Derive `kolm-evalcase-1` and embed only safe input/expected/params into artifacts.
loss_if_missing: Portable artifacts could leak source metadata or raw payloads if evals embed importer rows directly.
recommended_action: Keep source provenance in importer manifests, not embedded eval cases.

source_shape: `kolm-benchmark-1` reports artifact hash, K-score, eval pass counts, latency, egress, integrity, and errors.
kolm_target_fields: Join benchmark reports to source row IDs through importer manifest and receipt IDs.
loss_if_missing: Avoided-call and savings proof cannot connect back to original traces.
recommended_action: Add source_trace_ids and receipt IDs to benchmark/manifest sidecars before savings claims.

source_shape: Artifact receipts bind artifact_hash, eval_set_hash, eval_score, judge_id, chain, and signature.
kolm_target_fields: Map importer proof to row_checksum/source_checksum and later receipt write-back.
loss_if_missing: External systems cannot verify which imported rows produced a compiled artifact.
recommended_action: Add import receipt IDs and row checksums before write-back.

source_shape: SDK/API can list/get traces with filters and pagination.
kolm_target_fields: Map trace ID, tags, user/session fields, timestamps, and project into source/tags/identity.
loss_if_missing: Imported rows lose source navigation and dedupe keys.
recommended_action: Use Langfuse trace ID as source.trace_id and source.source_row_id when importing root rows.

source_shape: SDK/API exposes observations with trace filters, type filters, field selection, and usage fields.
kolm_target_fields: Map generation observations to input, output, metrics, source.span_id, and kind.
loss_if_missing: Generation rows flatten into text and lose token/cost usage.
recommended_action: Use observation IDs as span IDs and keep raw payload references by hash.

source_shape: SDK/API exposes scores through current high-performance endpoints and legacy score endpoints.
kolm_target_fields: Map each score to scores[] with source_id, scorer_ref, type, value, passed, and comment.
loss_if_missing: K-score cannot use external eval evidence without score provenance.
recommended_action: Preserve scores separately from expected output.

source_shape: SDK/API exposes datasets, dataset items, and dataset run items.
kolm_target_fields: Map dataset item IDs to expected.reference_id, routing.split, and source.project/dataset.
loss_if_missing: Dataset examples become untraceable after compile.
recommended_action: Use dataset items as the first `kolm-evalcase-1` fixture.

source_shape: Bulk export writes trace data to S3-compatible buckets in Parquet format and follows the run data format.
kolm_target_fields: Map Parquet rows into source, input, output, metrics, hierarchy, status, and tags.
loss_if_missing: Bulk enterprise exports cannot feed Kolm without a Parquet path.
recommended_action: Start with SDK/query fixtures, then add Parquet import.

source_shape: Run format includes id, trace_id, parent_run_id, child IDs, dotted_order, and run_type.
kolm_target_fields: Map to source.trace_id, source.span_id, source.parent_span_id, and kind.
loss_if_missing: Agent/tool traces lose hierarchy and cannot compile multi-step behavior.
recommended_action: Require hierarchy fields when source provides them.

source_shape: Run format includes inputs and outputs maps, with LLM runs commonly using message arrays.
kolm_target_fields: Map to input.messages/input.raw_ref and output.message/output.raw_ref.
loss_if_missing: Flattening loses chat role and tool structure.
recommended_action: Preserve structured IO before deriving prompt text.

source_shape: Run format includes token counts, costs, first token time, status, errors, tags, and feedback stats.
kolm_target_fields: Map to metrics, status, timestamps, scores, and tags.
loss_if_missing: Savings reports lack original model cost and quality evidence.
recommended_action: Keep token/cost and feedback fields in normalized rows.

source_shape: BTQL can export project logs, experiments, and datasets to JSON or Parquet.
kolm_target_fields: Map BTQL rows to source, input, output, scores, metrics, and raw payload checksums.
loss_if_missing: Braintrust eval evidence becomes manual copy/paste.
recommended_action: Add Braintrust JSON fixture after Langfuse.

source_shape: BTQL examples query scores and experiment review status.
kolm_target_fields: Map score columns to scores[] and summary metrics to importer manifest.
loss_if_missing: Source scores could be confused with recomputed K-score.
recommended_action: Store source scores as evidence, not as K-score.

source_shape: Datasets curate request/response data for fine-tuning, evaluation, and analysis.
kolm_target_fields: Map curated examples to routing.split, input.messages, output.text, metrics, and source IDs.
loss_if_missing: Helicone users cannot reuse curated examples in Kolm.
recommended_action: Build Helicone dataset fixture as second importer path.

source_shape: Dataset export offers fine-tuning JSONL with chat messages.
kolm_target_fields: Map messages directly to input.messages/output.message instead of prompt text only.
loss_if_missing: Chat role context and assistant behavior get lost.
recommended_action: Preserve messages as canonical IO.

source_shape: CSV analysis export includes request ID, timestamp, model, tokens, cost, user message, and assistant response.
kolm_target_fields: Map request_id, created_at, model, token counts, cost, input prompt, and output text.
loss_if_missing: Avoided-call reports cannot calculate source cost.
recommended_action: Use CSV as a low-friction fixture for cost accounting.

source_shape: Phoenix docs expose trace import/export, span query, CLI retrieval, and ATIF import paths.
kolm_target_fields: Map Phoenix spans to source trace/span hierarchy and OpenInference-style metadata.
loss_if_missing: Agent traces lose step structure before compilation.
recommended_action: Treat Phoenix as a hierarchy-first importer.

source_shape: Phoenix imports ATIF trajectories from coding-agent frameworks.
kolm_target_fields: Map trajectory steps to kind=tool/generation and parent-child fields.
loss_if_missing: Coding-agent traces cannot become artifact evals or receipts cleanly.
recommended_action: Keep ATIF-style step IDs and parent IDs in source fields.

source_shape: Weave Evaluation API exposes runs, predictions, scores, resolved dataset inputs, summaries, and scorer stats.
kolm_target_fields: Map predictions to input/output, scorer results to scores[], and summaries to importer manifest.
loss_if_missing: Eval-platform proof is lost if only outputs are imported.
recommended_action: Use Weave as a score-normalization fixture.

source_shape: Weave rows include content-addressable row digests for comparisons and dedupe.
kolm_target_fields: Map row_digest to source.source_row_id or proof.source_checksum.
loss_if_missing: Duplicate eval rows cannot be reconciled across runs.
recommended_action: Carry row_digest into normalized proof fields.

source_shape: OpenPipe exports raw JSONL with messages, tools, tool_choice, and split.
kolm_target_fields: Map messages/tools/tool_choice/split without flattening.
loss_if_missing: Tool-call replacement candidates become unusable.
recommended_action: Make OpenPipe JSONL a required fixture before tool-call claims.

source_shape: OpenPipe owns logs-to-fine-tuned replacement positioning.
kolm_target_fields: Map OpenPipe exports into compile candidates and compare against hosted fine-tune workflow.
loss_if_missing: Kolm cannot prove a portable alternative to hosted replacement.
recommended_action: Use schema fixtures to show portable artifact differentiation.

source_shape: LiteLLM custom callbacks can observe success/failure events around model calls.
kolm_target_fields: Map callback payloads to live `kolm-trace-1` rows or capture endpoint posts.
loss_if_missing: A gateway hook will block or lose data if schema is unclear.
recommended_action: Define callback payload after schema validation fixtures land.

source_shape: Vercel AI SDK can wrap language models through middleware.
kolm_target_fields: Map wrapped calls to source.system=vercel-ai-sdk and emit avoided-call receipts on artifact hits.
loss_if_missing: Artifact-first routing lacks trace proof.
recommended_action: Use schema as the event envelope for middleware.

source_shape: Gateway custom/private provider routes can target OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
kolm_target_fields: Map gateway requests/responses to capture rows with auth, provider, and receipt metadata.
loss_if_missing: Provider routing cannot prove avoided calls or privacy state.
recommended_action: Wait for capture schema before publishing gateway guides.

source_shape: All imported traces can contain user data, secrets, or regulated content.
kolm_target_fields: Require privacy.redaction_state, consent_basis, data_residency, retention_days, and raw_payload_ref.
loss_if_missing: Importer work creates a compliance liability before value proof.
recommended_action: Make redaction mode mandatory on every importer command.

source_shape: No `kolm-trace-1` or `kolm-evalcase-1` JSON schema exists today.
kolm_target_fields: Add JSON schema, fixtures, and loss-report tests before API importers.
loss_if_missing: Connectors will drift and public importer claims will be untestable.
recommended_action: Ship schema and fixtures as the next implementation step.
